careProfile.summary: The Poodle (Standard) is a large-sized breed with regular energy and minimal shedding.
careProfile.ownerFit: great with families and children; highly trainable — ideal for first-time owners; low-shedding coat reduces grooming burden
careProfile.exerciseNeeds: Benefits from 45–60 minutes of daily exercise — walks, play, or structured training.
careProfile.trainingNotes: Highly trainable — responds well to positive reinforcement and consistency.
careProfile.groomingNotes: Requires professional grooming every 6–8 weeks; daily brushing prevents matting.
careProfile.feedingContext: Feed 2 meals daily; adjust portions by activity level. Maintain healthy body condition — avoid overfeeding.

costDrivers.insurance: ~$42/mo base (varies by age, state, and plan)
costDrivers.training: Group puppy classes from $100–$200; optional private sessions $50–$150/hr
costDrivers.vetCare: Annual wellness visits $200–$400; breed-specific screening recommended

vetConversationPrompts: Ask your vet about Bloat (GDV) screening.
